_readme: 1. `scripts/backend.sh init` copies this file to models.json (chmod 600, gitignored).
2. Open models.json. For each model you have credentials for, replace `_template`
(or add a new key under `models`). Fill four fields: actor, cli_arg,
endpoint.base_url, endpoint.api_key. For Claude on an Anthropic-compat shim
3. Set active.codex and/or active.claude to your new model id.
4. Tell the chat parent to take over. It will:
- read only the non-secret fields (model id, base_url, capability/pricing fields),
- WebSearch each new model to fill underlying / context_window_k / max_output_k /
- extend role_defaults to include your new models,
The api_key never enters chat or agent context — it is read by the python subprocess
inside `apply` and written via `printf %q` to the env file. `backend.sh show` redacts
cursor-subagent entries below ship pre-filled because they don't need an endpoint

_template._status: Replace this entry's key (e.g. rename _template to gpt-5 or claude-opus-4-5). Entries whose key starts with _ are skipped by `apply`.

endpoint._claude_shim_doc: If actor=claude on an Anthropic-compat shim, also set opus_model, sonnet_model, haiku_model, and (optional) claude_effort_level.

cursor-composer-2.underlying: Cursor Composer 2 via Cursor Task subagent (auth via Cursor IDE)
cursor-composer-2.latency_warning: Pool-dependent, unbounded queue stalls observed (16 min). No --timeout-s.

cursor-claude-4.7-opus.underlying: Anthropic Claude 4.7 Opus via Cursor Task subagent (auth via Cursor IDE)

cursor-claude-4.6-sonnet.underlying: Anthropic Claude 4.6 Sonnet via Cursor Task subagent (auth via Cursor IDE)

cursor-gemini-3.1-pro.underlying: Google Gemini 3.1 Pro via Cursor Task subagent (auth via Cursor IDE)
